hero.title: Turn meeting notes into structured actions
hero.subtitle: Paste a transcript, upload notes, or try an example meeting. Meeting Brain extracts the summary, owners, risks, and next steps into a project-ready report.

card.title: Start with the meeting source
card.description: Add the meeting title and transcript below. When you generate the report, the analysis workspace appears underneath with loading progress first and structured output after.

placeholders.meetingTitle: Sprint review, rollout sync, vendor coordination...
placeholders.transcript: [10:00] Alice: Welcome everyone. Today we are discussing...

helper.supportedFiles: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD up to 5MB
helper.examplePrompt: Use the example meeting if you want to preview the workflow before pasting a real transcript.
